original_type_traits: light blue and beige coloration suggesting aquatic origin
dark blue accents on fins and tail
overall streamlined body shape for flight and swimming
anchor_phrases: long curved neck extending from head
curled tail tip with dark blue accent

visual_facts.silhouette: The Pokémon has a dragon-like silhouette with a long neck and a curved tail.
type_markers: no visible water droplets or leaf bulbs, but the coloration and overall shape suggest a water and flying type
